title: West Accuses Belarus of Orchestrating Migrant Crisis at Polish Border
content: Poland has massed troops at the border, the European Union’s eastern frontier, to keep migrants camped there from crossing into the country.

more_info.byline: By Anton Troianovski, Monika Pronczuk and Anatol Magdziarz
des_facet: Middle East and Africa Migrant Crisis

en_title: West Accuses Belarus of Orchestrating Migrant Crisis at Polish Border
en_content: Poland has massed troops at the border, the European Union’s eastern frontier, to keep migrants camped there from crossing into the country.

title: India Eased Its Covid-19 Disaster. Fears of Complacency Remain.
content: The success represents a major victory for Narendra Modi’s government, but a recent slowdown in new vaccinations has sparked worries.

more_info.byline: By Emily Schmall and Hari Kumar

en_title: India Eased Its Covid-19 Disaster. Fears of Complacency Remain.
en_content: The success represents a major victory for Narendra Modi’s government, but a recent slowdown in new vaccinations has sparked worries.

title: France Will Require Booster Shot for Those 65 and Older
content: President Emmanuel Macron, in a televised speech, said that older people will now have to get the shots to remain eligible for a vaccine passport.
en_title: France Will Require Booster Shot for Those 65 and Older
en_content: President Emmanuel Macron, in a televised speech, said that older people will now have to get the shots to remain eligible for a vaccine passport.

title: Afghan Pilots Who Escaped Taliban Are Flown Out of Tajikistan
content: More than 140 Afghan Air Force pilots and crew members were evacuated to the United Arab Emirates three months after flying into Tajikistan to escape the Taliban.
en_title: Afghan Pilots Who Escaped Taliban Are Flown Out of Tajikistan
en_content: More than 140 Afghan Air Force pilots and crew members were evacuated to the United Arab Emirates three months after flying into Tajikistan to escape the Taliban.

title: Ethiopia Seizes 16 U.N. Workers Amid Efforts to Halt Tigray War
content: The detentions aggravated the already tense relations between the United Nations and the Ethiopian government over war and famine in the country’s northern Tigray region.
en_title: Ethiopia Seizes 16 U.N. Workers Amid Efforts to Halt Tigray War
en_content: The detentions aggravated the already tense relations between the United Nations and the Ethiopian government over war and famine in the country’s northern Tigray region.

title: The World Needs to Quit Oil and Gas. Africa Has an Idea: Rich Countries First.
content: As negotiators at the Glasgow climate talks try to agree on greenhouse gas cuts, African leaders say poorer countries can’t be expected to remake their systems as quickly as wealthy ones.

des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: The World Needs to Quit Oil and Gas. Africa Has an Idea: Rich Countries First.
en_content: As negotiators at the Glasgow climate talks try to agree on greenhouse gas cuts, African leaders say poorer countries can’t be expected to remake their systems as quickly as wealthy ones.

title: Brain Drain From Britain Delivers Financial Boon to Estonia
content: The former Soviet satellite state is welcoming British companies looking to escape the tangle of regulations and financial obstacles of doing business in Europe.
en_title: Brain Drain From Britain Delivers Financial Boon to Estonia
en_content: The former Soviet satellite state is welcoming British companies looking to escape the tangle of regulations and financial obstacles of doing business in Europe.

title: Paytm, a payments company, is aiming to raise $2.5 billion amid India’s stock boom.
content: One97 Communications, the app’s parent company, has drawn interest from institutional investors as online shopping in India expands.
en_title: Paytm, a payments company, is aiming to raise $2.5 billion amid India’s stock boom.
en_content: One97 Communications, the app’s parent company, has drawn interest from institutional investors as online shopping in India expands.

title: U.S. Travel Ban Ends, Easing Personal Frustrations and Diplomatic Tension
content: Europeans were kept apart from family and friends as the ban dragged on long after E.U. leaders had opened their borders.
en_title: U.S. Travel Ban Ends, Easing Personal Frustrations and Diplomatic Tension
en_content: Europeans were kept apart from family and friends as the ban dragged on long after E.U. leaders had opened their borders.

content: Negotiators from about 200 countries are entering Week 2 of climate talks trying to resolve big issues around money, transparency and timelines.

title: Justice Dept. Brings New Charges in Ransomware Attacks
content: The department said it had charged a Russian national in one attack and recovered $6.1 million in ransom. It also arrested a Ukrainian man for another attack.

en_content: The department said it had charged a Russian national in one attack and recovered $6.1 million in ransom. It also arrested a Ukrainian man for another attack.

title: In Romania, Hard-Hit by Covid, Doctors Fight Vaccine Refusal
content: An anti-vaccine clarion call by leading religious figures, echoed by prominent politicians and social media, helps explain why Romania now has the world’s highest Covid death rate.
en_title: In Romania, Hard-Hit by Covid, Doctors Fight Vaccine Refusal
en_content: An anti-vaccine clarion call by leading religious figures, echoed by prominent politicians and social media, helps explain why Romania now has the world’s highest Covid death rate.

title: Malala Yousafzai Is Married in England
content: Ms. Yousafzai, a Pakistani activist and the youngest-ever recipient of a Nobel Peace Prize, married her partner at a small ceremony in Birmingham, England, she said on Twitter.

title: Frontline health workers in England will be required to be vaccinated by April.
content: About 80,000 to 100,000 National Health Service workers in the country remain unvaccinated against the coronavirus.

title: New Zealand’s Sea Lions Are Back, and Crashing Golf Courses and Soccer Matches
content: After their populations were decimated by hunters, New Zealand’s sea lions are returning to the coasts — sometimes surprising locals by turning up in unexpected places.

content: The blaze, in a hospital in central India on Monday night, was the latest in a series of deadly fires at health care centers in recent months.

title: The U.S. urges Beijing to release a Chinese citizen journalist who highlighted Covid.
